figures.caption: Figure 2. (a) Distortion map Ŷ ∈ R1×H×W of the channel representing local blur in Itest relative to Iref . (b) Images from (a) are flipped and thus Ŷ is now able to show blurry regions in new Itest relative to the new Iref owing to anti-symmetric training (Sec. 3). Local blur in Itest indicated by red arrows and corresponding regions on Ŷ indicated by green arrows.

Figure 1. Relational IQA scoring correlates with lower levels of global and localized distortions. In this example, images are produced by models of increasing network capacity and differ in IQ. The image with highest score has more textured patterns in semantic regions (i.e., higher resolution), lower uniform and non-uniform noise, and less haze artifacts.
